release_month_strategy.rationale: release_month has 23.26% missing values globally, with extreme temporal skew (train: 126,895 vs val: 8,455 vs test: 1,139). The missingness is a strong temporal proxy — missing in older releases, present in newer ones. Ablation study required to determine if including the indicator provides net benefit.
ablation_variants: ABL-B: release_month missing-only (all as 0) + release_month_missing indicator
ABL-D: release_month as decade proxy (extract from release_year)
ABL-E: release_month present + NO release_month_missing indicator
